message:
fix: make restart_tracker crash-loop params configurable (ZFC) (gt-jq7l)

Replace hardcoded constants (initialBackoff, maxBackoff, backoffMultiplier,
crashLoopWindow, crashLoopCount, stabilityPeriod) with RestartTrackerConfig
struct, configurable via patrols.restart_tracker in daemon.json.

Zero-valued fields default to previous hardcoded values, so existing
deployments are unaffected. Operators can now tune crash-loop detection
without code changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
